scripts.prepare-fixtures: rm -rf compositions assets fixtures/*/compositions fixtures/*/assets fixtures/*/motion-harness && mkdir -p compositions && cp ../../compositions/title-card.html ../../compositions/title-card.motion.json compositions/ && cp -R ../../assets assets
scripts.check: npm run prepare-fixtures && npm run check:default && npm run check:fixtures
scripts.check:default: npx --yes hyperframes@0.7.48 lint && npx --yes hyperframes@0.7.48 validate && npx --yes hyperframes@0.7.48 inspect --at-transitions --strict
scripts.check:fixtures: for fixture in fixtures/*; do echo ">>> $fixture"; rm -rf "$fixture/compositions" "$fixture/assets"; mkdir -p "$fixture/compositions"; cp compositions/title-card.html compositions/title-card.motion.json "$fixture/compositions/"; cp -R assets "$fixture/assets"; node scripts/prepare-motion-harness.mjs "$fixture"; npx --yes hyperframes@0.7.48 lint "$fixture" && npx --yes hyperframes@0.7.48 validate "$fixture" && npx --yes hyperframes@0.7.48 inspect "$fixture" --at 1.8,5.8 --strict && npx --yes hyperframes@0.7.48 lint "$fixture/motion-harness" && npx --yes hyperframes@0.7.48 validate "$fixture/motion-harness" && npx --yes hyperframes@0.7.48 inspect "$fixture/motion-harness" --strict || exit 1; done
scripts.snapshot: npm run prepare-fixtures && rm -rf snapshots && npx --yes hyperframes@0.7.48 snapshot --at 0.2,0.9,1.8,4.5,5.8
